name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Pie/Lowfat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch pie plate, combine gingersnap crumbs and brown sugar.
2. Drizzle with melted margarine.
3. Pat the crumbs into the bottom and up the side of the pie plate to form the crust; set aside.
4. In a blender, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over cold milk; let stand for 2 minutes.
5. Add hot milk and process at low speed until the gelatin is completely dissolved, about 2 minutes.
6. Add pumpkin, cream cheese, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, salt, and cloves. Process at high speed until thoroughly blended, scraping sides frequently, about 5 minutes.
7. Pour into the prepared crust.
8. Chill until firm, about 3 hours.
9. Top with whipped topping.
